LanguageData.UB.SurvivedBattle: {0} colonists fought through the danger together and grew closer.
LanguageData.UB.SurvivedFire: {0} colonists battled the flames together and grew closer.
LanguageData.UB.SurvivedOutbreak: {0} colonists endured the outbreak together and grew closer.
LanguageData.UB.RestartHeader: These options require a game restart:
LanguageData.UB.CapableBackstories.Tip: The hand-review of work disables across vanilla, DLC, and supported backstory mods. Disables that the story doesn't earn are removed, some traded for skill penalties.
LanguageData.UB.MoodRebalance.Tip: Rescaled opinion and mood outliers: selling a loved one, cheating, divorce, breakups, kibble, dead man's apparel, recreation/beauty/room-size debuffs, and more.
LanguageData.UB.GriefTaper.Tip: Death and loss thoughts start ~1.5x sharper and fade gradually to nothing over 40 days, instead of a flat debuff that falls off a cliff.
LanguageData.UB.NeedsGracePeriod.Tip: For the colony's first 5 days, recreation and comfort decay at 25% speed, easing back to normal by day 20.
LanguageData.UB.HardshipBonding.Tip: Colonists who actively fight through a raid, large fire, or disease outbreak together gain mutual opinion.
LanguageData.UB.BetrayalWitnesses.Tip: When someone cheats on a colonist or sells their loved one, every colonist on the map loses some opinion of the offender.
LanguageData.UB.BackstoryPairing.Tip: Implausible childhood-to-adulthood combos (tribal child into spacer adult, gutter child into nobility) are re-rolled during pawn generation - rare, not impossible.
LanguageData.UB.TraitAlignment.Tip: Generated traits lean toward the pawn's life story: hardened backstories lean tough and brave, pampered ones soft, scholars smart, ice-worlders cold-tolerant. Includes Vanilla Traits Expanded and Combat Extended traits when present.
LanguageData.UB.RomanceCooldown.Tip: Pawns give up on a specific person after two rebuffs and get generally discouraged after several, recovering as the memories fade.
LanguageData.UB.AwkwardChat.Tip: After a failed romance, the pair's small talk turns into awkward chat (mild opinion friction) until they get over it.
LanguageData.UB.AutoDisabled.Tip: {0} is loaded and already provides this feature, so this mod steps aside automatically. Remove that mod and this feature turns back on.
LanguageData.UB.ElderhoodEnabled.Tip: Elderhood backstories unlock for pawns aged 60+, representing their later-life experiences. Requires restart.
LanguageData.UB.ZCBEnabled.Tip: Dedicated childhood-only backstories that can only appear as child backstories for pawns generated as children. Requires restart.
LanguageData.UB.AddElderhood.Tip: Add an elderhood backstory for this pawn.
LanguageData.UB.ClickToAddElderhood: Click + to add an elderhood backstory
